title: [codereview-pass2] coap_dtn.c rate limit missing
description: Rate limiting for /deaddrop not yet implemented per parent. P3 readability.
close_reason: Added per-IID[7] rate limit in deaddrop_post using CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_DEADDROP_RATE_LIMIT_MS, Kconfig option, net_ip.h include; rate limit for /deaddrop now implemented per parent and spec 18.9 (6/hr). Verified no P0/P1 in review. Matches all related codereview beads.
